hero.max_rank_skill_tips_translated: Active effect enhanced: Meditation upgraded to Ultra-Meditation.
hero.max_rank_skill_desc_translated: Ultra-Meditation: Reduce damage taken by 60% for the next hit. Clear when the enemy turn ends or after taking damage. Once cleared, grant the affected character an 8% increase to basic stats for 2 turns, up to 16%.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_ActiveSkill_lv1
skills.desc_short_translated: Grant all allied characters #Entry_1# for 1 turn, and increase all allied characters' MAX HP by #Factor_1# for 1 turn.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: Grant all allied characters #Entry_1# for 1 turn, and increase all allied characters' MAX HP by #Factor_1# for 1 turn.
skills.entry_desc_translated: Meditation: Reduce damage taken by 40% for the next hit. Clear when the enemy turn ends or after taking damage. Once cleared, grant the affected character a 6% increase to basic stats for 2 turns, up to 12%.
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: Ultra-Meditation: Reduce damage taken by 60% for the next hit. Clear when the enemy turn ends or after taking damage. Once cleared, grant the affected character an 8% increase to basic stats for 2 turns, up to 16%.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1084_p1
skills.desc_short_translated: When the battle starts, grant the allied character with the highest ATK #Entry_1#. Before using active skill, characters with #Entry_1# will remove all debuffs and gain a 10% increase in ATK-related stats for 1 turn. When a character with #Entry_1# dies, the allied character with the highest ATK will receive #Entry_1#.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: When the battle starts, grant the allied character with the highest ATK #Entry_1#. Before using active skill, characters with #Entry_1# will remove all debuffs and gain a 10% increase in ATK-related stats for 1 turn. When a character with #Entry_1# dies, the allied character with the highest ATK will receive #Entry_1#.
skills.entry_desc_translated: *Sharpen: When your turn starts, increase affected character's skill level.
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: *Sharpen: When your turn starts, increase affected character's skill level.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1084_p2
skills.desc_short_translated: After any allied character uses a skill, grant yourself 1 #Entry_1#. Upon using your active skill, grant #Entry_1# equal to your skill level. When #Entry_1# reaches 3, remove all #Entry_1# and increase the skill level of all allies.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: After any allied character uses a skill, grant yourself 1 #Entry_1#. Upon using your active skill, grant #Entry_1# equal to your skill level. When #Entry_1# reaches 3, remove all #Entry_1# and increase the skill level of all allies.
skills.entry_desc_translated: *Revelation: Upon removal, increase all allied characters' MAX HP by 1.5%, up to 15%.
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: *Revelation: Upon removal, increase all allied characters' MAX HP by 1.5%, up to 15%.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1084_p3
skills.desc_short_translated:
When a character with #Entry_1# uses an active skill, grant them additional effects based on their skill level:
Lv 1: Increases ATK by 15%.
Lv 2: Increases ATK by 15%, increases PEN Rate by 10%.
Lv 3: Increases ATK by 20%, increases PEN Rate by 10%.
skills.max_desc_short_translated:
When a character with #Entry_1# uses an active skill, grant them additional effects based on their skill level:
Lv 1: Increases ATK by 15%.
Lv 2: Increases ATK by 15%, increases PEN Rate by 10%.
Lv 3: Increases ATK by 20%, increases PEN Rate by 10%.
skills.entry_desc_translated: *Sharpen: When your turn starts, increase affected character's skill level.
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: *Sharpen: When your turn starts, increase affected character's skill level.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_burst_1
skills.desc_short_translated: Grant yourself 1 #Entry_1# after Power Burst.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: Grant yourself 1 #Entry_1# after Power Burst.
skills.entry_desc_translated: *Revelation: Upon removal, increase all allied characters' MAX HP by 1.5%, up to 15%.
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: *Revelation: Upon removal, increase all allied characters' MAX HP by 1.5%, up to 15%.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1084_rp2
skills.desc_short_translated: After any allied character uses a skill, gain yourself 1 #Entry_1#. Upon using your active skill, gain #Entry_1# equal to your skill level. When #Entry_1# reaches 3, remove all #Entry_1# and increase the skill level of all allies. When your turn starts, gain yourself 1 #Entry_1#.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: After any allied character uses a skill, gain yourself 1 #Entry_1#. Upon using your active skill, gain #Entry_1# equal to your skill level. skills.name: tid#SkillName_weak_1
skills.desc_short_translated: When Suffering Weak, heal 30% of lost HP and grant yourself Debuff Immunity for 1 turn.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: When Suffering Weak, heal 30% of lost HP and grant yourself Debuff Immunity for 1 turn.
